subject: Activate your image32 account!
body:
[http://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/image32-images/Emails/image32_email_logo.png]http://email.getvero.

Just a quick note to check in on how you're doing getting started with image32.

You haven't yet activated your account, so if you have any questions about where
to start please hit reply and let me know directly - I look forward to helping.

Best regards,
Bob Pellican
Co-founder and CEO, image32
415-254-2938
